title: Update Podman instatllation guide with ecryptfs error fix
body:
### Feature request description

The section of Podman installation guide about installing from source needs a note: https://podman.io/docs/installation#get-source-code

I'm using encrypted $HOME on my machine.
I have encountered the following issue after the installation and running arbitrary `podman` subcommand:
`Error: configure storage: 'overlay' is not supported over ecryptfs, a mount_program is required: backing file system is unsupported for this graph driver`

I didn't have this error while installing with `apt` on Ubuntu. However, that version is very outdated, so I assume many people would build from source for new features and bug fixes.

### Suggest potential solution

Add a note to the guide about installing `fuse-overlayfs` package. I suggest it into **Optional packages** section.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: @violog thanks for the report. Would you be interested in creating a PR on https://github.com/containers/podman.io ? The actual change would be on [this file](https://github.com/containers/podman.io/blob/main/docs/installation.md)
